net.bhl.cdt.paxelerate.model

Interface PassengerProperties

  • All Superinterfaces:
    org.eclipse.emf.ecore.EObject, org.eclipse.emf.common.notify.Notifier
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    PassengerPropertiesImpl

    public interface PassengerProperties
extends org.eclipse.emf.ecore.EObject
    A representation of the model object 'Passenger Properties'.

    The following features are supported:

    • Passenger Width Mean Male
    • Passenger Width Deviation Male
    • Passenger Weight Mean Male
    • Passenger Weight Deviation Male
    • Passenger Height Mean Male
    • Passenger Height Deviation Male
    • Passenger Depth Mean Male
    • Passenger Depth Deviation Male
    • Percentage Of Women
    • Passenger Width Mean Female
    • Passenger Width Deviation Female
    • Passenger Weight Mean Female
    • Passenger Weight Deviation Female
    • Passenger Height Mean Female
    • Passenger Height Deviation Female
    • Passenger Depth Mean Female
    • Passenger Depth Deviation Female
    See Also:
    CabinPackage.getPassengerProperties()

    • Method Detail

      • getPassengerWidthMeanMale

        double getPassengerWidthMeanMale()
        Returns the value of the 'Passenger Width Mean Male' attribute. The default value is "47".

        If the meaning of the 'Passenger Width Mean Male' attribute isn't clear, there really should be more of a description here...

        Returns:
        the value of the 'Passenger Width Mean Male' attribute.
        See Also:
        setPassengerWidthMeanMale(double), CabinPackage.getPassengerProperties_PassengerWidthMeanMale()

      • setPassengerWidthMeanMale

        void setPassengerWidthMeanMale(double value)
        Sets the value of the 'Passenger Width Mean Male' attribute.
        Parameters:
        value - the new value of the 'Passenger Width Mean Male' attribute.
        See Also:
        getPassengerWidthMeanMale()

      • getPassengerWidthDeviationMale

        double getPassengerWidthDeviationMale()
        Returns the value of the 'Passenger Width Deviation Male' attribute. The default value is "2.8".

        If the meaning of the 'Passenger Width Deviation Male' attribute isn't clear, there really should be more of a description here...

        Returns:
        the value of the 'Passenger Width Deviation Male' attribute.
        See Also:
        setPassengerWidthDeviationMale(double), CabinPackage.getPassengerProperties_PassengerWidthDeviationMale()
